TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Don_Adams, title = Don_Adams, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Don_Adams} }

S.FORM: ===== Don Adams ===== kawas tay 1947, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 11, Don Adams, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2013) Don Adams sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. Don Adams htgan beh Manhattan ,hiya yaba William Yarmy ru yaya Consuelo.hiya ru sswe mlikuy ,suruw lga squilq na psibay, Dick Yarmy lalu nya. qnxan nya Don Adams kekong cyugal nya. raral bes Adelaide Efantis Adams, Dorothy Bracken Adams ru Judy Luciano nya,cyugal bes likong. hiya sswe mlikuy squilq na psibay(1932 kawas 2 byacing 14 ryax-1992 kawas 5 byacing 5 ryax).hiya sswe kneril( Gloria Yarmy Burton) qutux patas pincyogan nya. maki pitu laqi nya Carolyn,Christine,Cathy,Cecily,Stacey,Sean ru Beige.hiya kneril laqi (Cecily塞西莉) 2004 kawas magal nbu wal mhuqil la.hiya mlikuy laqi 肖恩 2006 kawas magal tunux nbu wal mhuqil la(35 kawas). mhuqil Adams 2005 kawas 9 byacing 25 ryax,maki Angeles,California na Cedars-Sinai wal mhuqil la. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

===== Don Adams ===== kawas tay 1947, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 11, Don Adams, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2013) Don Adams sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. Don Adams htgan beh Manhattan ,hiya yaba William Yarmy ru yaya Consuelo.hiya ru sswe mlikuy ,suruw lga squilq na psibay, Dick Yarmy lalu nya. qnxan nya Don Adams kekong cyugal nya. raral bes Adelaide Efantis Adams, Dorothy Bracken Adams ru Judy Luciano nya,cyugal bes likong. hiya sswe mlikuy squilq na psibay(1932 kawas 2 byacing 14 ryax-1992 kawas 5 byacing 5 ryax).hiya sswe kneril( Gloria Yarmy Burton) qutux patas pincyogan nya. maki pitu laqi nya Carolyn,Christine,Cathy,Cecily,Stacey,Sean ru Beige.hiya kneril laqi (Cecily塞西莉) 2004 kawas magal nbu wal mhuqil la.hiya mlikuy laqi 肖恩 2006 kawas magal tunux nbu wal mhuqil la(35 kawas). mhuqil Adams 2005 kawas 9 byacing 25 ryax,maki Angeles,California na Cedars-Sinai wal mhuqil la. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ===== *on a*ams~ɕ ===== kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, *on a*ams~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) *on a*ams~ɕ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. *on a*ams~ɕ ħtɣan βeħ manħattan ,ħija jaβa william jarmj ru jaja ʦ~ʨons~ɕuelo.ħija ru s~ɕs~ɕwe mlikuj ,s~ɕuruw lɣa s~ɕquilq na ps~ɕiβaj, *iʦ~ʨk jarmj lalu nja. qnxan nja *on a*ams~ɕ kekoŋ ʦ~ʨjuɣal nja. raral βes~ɕ a*elai*e e*antis~ɕ a*ams~ɕ, *orotħj βraʦ~ʨken a*ams~ɕ ru *u*j luʦ~ʨiano nja,ʦ~ʨjuɣal βes~ɕ likoŋ. ħija s~ɕs~ɕwe mlikuj s~ɕquilq na ps~ɕiβaj(**** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax-**** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax).ħija s~ɕs~ɕwe kneril( ɣloria jarmj βurton) qutux patas~ɕ pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja. maki pitu laqi nja ʦ~ʨaroljn,ʦ~ʨħris~ɕtine,ʦ~ʨatħj,ʦ~ʨeʦ~ʨilj,s~ɕtaʦ~ʨej,s~ɕean ru βeiɣe.ħija kneril laqi (ʦ~ʨeʦ~ʨilj***) **** kawas~ɕ maɣal nβu wal mħuqil la.ħija mlikuj laqi ** **** kawas~ɕ maɣal tunux nβu wal mħuqil la(** kawas~ɕ). mħuqil a*ams~ɕ **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax,maki aŋeles~ɕ,ʦ~ʨali*ornia na ʦ~ʨe*ars~ɕ-s~ɕinai wal mħuqil la. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
